description: Structural contract for scout-report.md handoff artifacts (C2-handoff-schemas).

required_first_line.fail_message: challenge token missing from line 1 — report may be a forgery

required_sections.name: proposed_tasks
required_sections.fail_message: ## Proposed Tasks (or ANCHOR:proposed_tasks) missing — Scout must declare what to build

required_sections.name: acceptance_criteria
required_sections.fail_message: ## Exit/Acceptance Criteria (or ANCHOR:acceptance_criteria) missing — Scout must define done-conditions

conditional_sections.name: carryover_decisions
conditional_sections.fail_message: ## Carryover Decisions missing — required by v8.57.0 Layer S when carryoverTodos[] is non-empty
